rationale: The citing paper references Agarwal et al. (2011) only in grouped literature citations (general sponsored-search background and a bundle of prior keyword-characteristic studies). It does not engage this paper's specific position-profitability framework, methods, or findings in a distinct way, nor does it build hypotheses or modeling choices directly from it. Because the citation functions as part of broad prior-work listing rather than a paper-specific dependency, the role is best classified as mention only.
